subject: Hello Dear Jeffrey
body:
Dear Jeffrey, hopefully you are doing well! I am writing to tell you about my plans. 
   I know that you are busy, and I am sorry if I bothering you. Just I am very appreciative for all what you have done to me.   
      Eventually, I've moved forward! I’ve involved in intensive French courses. The school will give me work permit, so I will be allowed working in Geneva!
  I would have already three jobs! In Raphael clinic, Johan Paul Gaultier store and Kempinski  Hotel, but at that moment
  I hadn’t have language skills and work permit. In one month I will pick up the language and I will have a job! 
  So in summer time I will learn and work, on August I am going to try few ballet companies. I still don’t want to give up with ballet.
  But the most important that I will be aware what means to work and earn some money! 
  I know that step by step I will reach something what I wish to have... I wish to be able to help people like you do. I will start from my family.
       By the way, I and my parents are invited to Svetlana wedding, tomorrow she will get marred in Vilnius. 
    Thanks for your time. I wish you all the best!
    Lots of love, Simona.
_________________________________________________________________

body_html:
Dear Jeffrey, hopefully you are doing well! I am writing to tell you about my plans.

   I know that you are busy, and I am sorry if I bothering you. Just I am very appreciative for all what you have done to me.   

      Eventually, I've moved forward! I’ve involved in intensive French courses. The school will give me work permit, so I will be allowed working in Geneva!

  I would have already three jobs! In Raphael clinic, Johan Paul Gaultier store and Kempinski  Hotel, but at that moment

  I hadn’t have language skills and work permit. In one month I will pick up the language and I will have a job!

  So in summer time I will learn and work, on August I am going to try few ballet companies. I still don’t want to give up with ballet.

  But the most important that I will be aware what means to work and earn some money!

  I know that step by step I will reach something what I wish to have... I wish to be able to help people like you do. I will start from my family.

       By the way, I and my parents are invited to Svetlana wedding, tomorrow she will get marred in Vilnius.

    Thanks for your time. I wish you all the best!

    Lots of love, Simona.
